scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-redis.mjs && node scripts/ensure-ollama.mjs && concurrently -n api,web,worker -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent/api && npm run build -w @agent/web
scripts.test: node --test scripts/*.test.mjs && npm run test -w @agent/api && npm run test -w @agent/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agent/api && npm run typecheck -w @agent/web
